package.json.general_idea: Update Node.js engine requirement to a version compatible with modern tooling and JDK 11+ build environments.
package.json.why_exists: Older Node.js versions (e.g., 0.12) are incompatible with modern npm packages and may fail to run scripts required for the build process on current systems.

package.json.general_idea: Replace Grunt-based build system with Angular CLI and Webpack for frontend compilation.
package.json.why_exists: Grunt is deprecated and incompatible with the new Angular-based frontend structure; the build will fail without the new tooling.

package.json.general_idea: Add Angular framework dependencies for the new frontend architecture.
package.json.why_exists: The application has migrated to Angular; these packages are required for the application to compile and run.

package.json.general_idea: Add Angular CLI and build tooling dependencies.
package.json.why_exists: Angular CLI is required to build and serve the Angular application.
The project has switched from Karma/Jasmine to Jest for unit testing; tests will fail without these dependencies.

package.json.general_idea: Add Webpack and related plugins for module bundling.
package.json.why_exists: Webpack is the core bundler for the new Angular build process.

pom.xml.general_idea: Update maven-compiler-plugin to use annotationProcessorPaths for MapStruct and Hibernate JPA metamodel generation, replacing the legacy maven-processor-plugin.
pom.xml.why_exists: The maven-processor-plugin is deprecated and incompatible with modern annotation processing standards; without this change, MapStruct and JPA metamodel generation will fail or produce incorrect source paths in JDK 11+ environments.

pom.xml.general_idea: Update Liquibase plugin dependencies to use liquibase-hibernate5 instead of liquibase-hibernate4.
pom.xml.why_exists: liquibase-hibernate4 is incompatible with Hibernate 5/6 used in Spring Boot 2.x/JDK 11; without this change, Liquibase diff generation fails with classpath errors.

src/main/resources/config/application-pr.general_idea: Migrate datasource configuration from legacy MySQL JDBC driver to HikariCP connection pool.
src/main/resources/config/application-pr.why_exists: The com.mysql.jdbc.jdbc2.optional.MysqlDataSource class is deprecated/removed in newer MySQL Connector/J versions, and Spring Boot 2.x (required for JDK 11) defaults to HikariCP; using the old class causes runtime initialization failures or classpath errors.

src/main/resources/config/application-pr.general_idea: Update Hibernate dialect to support newer MySQL versions and JDBC drivers.
src/main/resources/config/application-pr.why_exists: The org.hibernate.dialect.MySQLInnoDBDialect class was removed in Hibernate 5.2+; using it causes a ClassNotFoundException or initialization error at startup.

src/main/resources/config/application-pr.general_idea: Remove deprecated Hibernate naming strategy configuration.
src/main/resources/config/application-pr.why_exists: The org.hibernate.cfg.EJB3NamingStrategy class was removed in Hibernate 5.2+; referencing it causes a ClassNotFoundException at startup.

src/main/resources/config/application-pr.general_idea: Replace deprecated Ehcache region factory with standard JCache provider.
src/main/resources/config/application-pr.why_exists: The org.hibernate.cache.ehcache.SingletonEhCacheRegionFactory class was removed in Hibernate 5.2+; using it causes a ClassNotFoundException or cache initialization failure.

src/main/resources/config/application-pr.general_idea: Update JDBC URL to include timezone and SSL parameters required by newer MySQL drivers.
src/main/resources/config/application-pr.why_exists: Newer MySQL Connector/J versions (8.0+) require explicit serverTimezone and useSSL settings; omitting them causes runtime exceptions or connection failures.

src/main/resources/config/application-pr.general_idea: Migrate metrics configuration from Spring Boot 1.x format to Spring Boot 2.x Micrometer format.
src/main/resources/config/application-pr.why_exists: The 'metrics' property namespace was removed in Spring Boot 2.0; using it results in unrecognized configuration properties warnings or failures if strict binding is enabled.
src/main/resources/config/application-pr.after:
management:
  metrics:
    export:
      prometheus:
        enabled: false

src/main/resources/config/application-pr.general_idea: Migrate Liquibase configuration from Spring Boot 1.x format to Spring Boot 2.x format.
src/main/resources/config/application-pr.why_exists: The 'liquibase' root property was moved under 'spring.liquibase' in Spring Boot 2.0; using the old format results in unrecognized configuration properties.

src/main/resources/config/application-pr.general_idea: Migrate Spring profiles configuration from Spring Boot 1.x format to Spring Boot 2.x format.
src/main/resources/config/application-pr.why_exists: The 'spring.profiles.active' property structure changed in Spring Boot 2.0; using the old nested format may result in unrecognized configuration properties.

src/main/resources/config/application.ym.general_idea: Migrate Spring Boot 1.x management endpoint configuration to Spring Boot 2.x structure.
src/main/resources/config/application.ym.why_exists: Spring Boot 2.x removed the `management.security.enabled` and `endpoints.*` properties in favor of the new `management.endpoints` and `management.endpoint` hierarchy; using old properties results in ignored configuration or startup warnings/errors.
src/main/resources/config/application.ym.before:
management.security.enabled: true
security.basic.enabled: false
endpoints.jolokia.enabled: false
src/main/resources/config/application.ym.after:
management:
  endpoints:
    web:
      base-path: /management
      exposure:
        include: ['configprops', 'env', 'health', 'info', 'jhimetrics', 'logfile', 'loggers', 'prometheus', 'threaddump']
  endpoint:
    health:
      show-details: when_authorized
      roles: 'ROLE_ADMIN'

src/main/resources/config/application.ym.general_idea: Migrate async task executor configuration from custom JHipster properties to standard Spring Boot 2.x `spring.task.execution` properties.
src/main/resources/config/application.ym.why_exists: Spring Boot 2.x standardizes async configuration under `spring.task.execution`; while custom properties might still bind if a custom `@ConfigurationProperties` class exists, the migration aligns with the framework's standard auto-configuration to ensure compatibility with Spring Boot 2.x defaults.
src/main/resources/config/application.ym.after:
spring:
  task:
    execution:
      thread-name-prefix: jhipster-websocket-sample-application-task-
      pool:
        core-size: 2
        max-size: 50
        queue-capacity: 10000

src/main/resources/config/application.ym.general_idea: Migrate mail configuration from custom JHipster properties to standard Spring Boot 2.x `spring.mail` properties.
src/main/resources/config/application.ym.why_exists: Spring Boot 2.x expects mail configuration under `spring.mail`; relying on custom `mail:` root properties requires custom binding which may be removed or deprecated in the migration target.
src/main/resources/config/application.ym.before:
mail:
    host: localhost
    port: 25
    username:
    password:
    protocol: smtp
    tls: false
    auth: false
    from: jhipster@localhost

src/main/resources/config/application.ym.general_idea: Migrate Swagger configuration from custom JHipster properties to standard Springfox/SpringDoc properties compatible with Spring Boot 2.x.
src/main/resources/config/application.ym.why_exists: The old `swagger:` root properties are specific to JHipster 4/5 custom configuration classes; JHipster 6+ uses standard Springfox properties under `jhipster.api-docs` or similar, requiring the structure change to bind correctly.
src/main/resources/config/application.ym.before:
swagger:
    title: jhipster API
    description: jhipster applications and beyond!
    version: 0.0.1
    termsOfServiceUrl: http://jhipster.github.io/
    contact:
    license: Apache 2.0
    licenseUrl: http://www.apache.org/licenses/LICENSE-2.0.html
src/main/resources/config/application.ym.after:
jhipster:
  api-docs:
    default-include-pattern: /api/.*
    title: jhipsterWebsocketSampleApplication API
    description: jhipsterWebsocketSampleApplication API documentation
    version: 0.0.1
    terms-of-service-url:
    contact-name:
    contact-url:
    contact-email:
    license: unlicensed
    license-url:
